productDisplayName: ADIDAS Black Hydroterra Shandal Casual Shoes
description: Explore the outdoors with confidence in these Hydroterro Shandal shoes from adidas. With a combination of mesh uppers and slip resistant outsole, these shoes are designed to help you navigate slippery rocks and water bodies. Team these with waterproof jackets, tees and shorts and you are ready to take on the rapids.UpperOpen mesh upper for better ventilation and easy water drainageadidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the lateral side in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Slip-on design with panel on the back with elasticated sides for easy insertion and removal of the feetMeshed tongue for absolute breathability Lace-up system with loops around the ankle with a doggle for a snug, customized FitMidsoleRemovable footbed that can be replaced with a medical orthotic for all day cushioned comfortOutsoleOutsole with aggressive multi-directional lugs for superior grip on slippery surfacesFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feetBuilt up heel and toe counter for better protection to the heel and toeshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
